title: planchonella longipes
intro: Planchonella longipes, also known as the Mountain Apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to New Caledonia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Planchonella longipes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
